hindi: जय सोमनाथ महादेव, जय सोमनाथ। प्रभास क्षेत्र विराजत, सुर नर मुनि नाथ॥
english: Victory to Lord Somnath Mahadeva; you dwell in Prabhas Kshetra, lord of gods, humans and sages
roman: Jai Somnath Mahadev, Jai Somnath, Prabhas Kshetra Virajat Sur Nar Muni Nath

hindi: द्वादश ज्योतिर्लिंगों में, प्रथम तुम्हारा नाम। चंद्रदेव ने स्थापित, किया तुम्हारा धाम॥
english: Among the twelve Jyotirlingas, yours is the first name; Chandradeva established your divine abode
roman: Dwadash Jyotirlingo Mein Pratham Tumhara Naam, Chandradev Ne Sthapit Kiya Tumhara Dhaam

hindi: भस्म विभूषण, नंदी संग सोहे। गंगा जटाधारी, सबके मन मोहे॥
english: Adorned with sacred ash, shining with Nandi beside; Ganga flows from his matted hair, enchanting all minds
roman: Bhasm Vibhooshan Nandi Sang Sohe, Ganga Jatadhari Sabke Man Mohe

hindi: सोमनाथ की आरती, जो नित्य नेम गावे। गुजरात में दर्शन कर, परम पद पावे॥
english: Whoever sings Somnath's aarti daily with devotion; by taking darshan in Gujarat attains the highest state
roman: Somnath Ki Aarti Jo Nitya Nem Gaave, Gujarat Mein Darshan Kar Param Pad Paave
